overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit urban plaza at dusk, transitioning into an upscale indoor lounge with seated patrons. The scene features prominent holographic billboards, modern architecture, and dense cyberpunk atmosphere with cyan and magenta lighting.

approaching the entrance to the indoor lounge area from the open plaza

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic urban plaza at dusk, dominated by large glowing digital billboards advertising 'CIRKUS' and displaying a female character. The camera moves through the open concrete space with glass railings, passing structural pillars and observing the city street below. Sparse pedestrians walk through the plaza as the camera approaches the entrance to an indoor lounge.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale cyberpunk lounge with neon ambient lighting and city views

events.description: entering the indoor lounge from the outdoor plaza, transitioning from natural to artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the lounge past seated patrons, observing the interior design and neon lighting

seated patron in brown jacket and pink pants relaxing on leather banquette

entered.detail: long dark leather sofa seating along the left wall with patrons relaxing
curved armchairs with glowing pink neon ring bases arranged around tables
tall bamboo stalks in planters separating the seating area from the glass windows
large illuminated circular ring decorations on the far wall with teal neon accents
linear cyan and white neon light strips running along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera enters an upscale indoor lounge featuring dark leather banquette seating, futuristic armchairs with glowing pink neon bases, and tall bamboo plants lining the glass windows. Moderate crowds of seated patrons occupy the space while cyan neon ceiling strips illuminate the reflective marble floor. The camera continues walking through the lounge toward the circular wall decorations at the far end, with the bustling neon-lit city visible through the windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vast, neon-lit urban plaza at dusk into the intimate, upscale interior of a futuristic lounge. It begins in an open concrete space dominated by towering digital billboards advertising 'CIRKUS', moving past glass railings and structural pillars while overlooking the city streets below. As the camera approaches the building's entrance, the wide outdoor atmosphere shifts into a refined indoor setting characterized by reflective marble floors and cyan neon ceiling strips. The scene then expands through the lounge, passing dark leather banquettes, glowing pink armchairs, and tall bamboo plants while patrons occupy the space. Finally, the camera glides toward circular wall decorations at the far end of the room, keeping the bustling city lights visible through the expansive glass windows.
